title: Dog Harness Mesh Breathable Comfortable Pet Vest No Pull Adjustable Soft Padded Dog Power Strap (S, Red)
features: APPROXIMATE SIZE: S: Approx.Chest 49-62cm(19.29-24.41inch) Neck 38-49cm(14.96-19.29inch). Please choose by Chest measurement in priority, Neck secondary. The weight should only be used as a guideline.

HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL: Made of high quality air mesh material, very breathable and durable, lightweight, soft and comfortable. This pet harness is ideal both for warmer days and year-round, especially great in summer.

SPECIALL DESIGN: Stainless Steel D-ring leash attachment point on the back for a leash; Easy to fit with adjustable belt strap and control. Lightweight plastic buckle with large loading capacity, is secure and easy to fit and put on/take off.
FASHIONALE: Mesh vest keeps dogs cool. We have Two colors available, which assures you to create a harmonious and happy atmosphere with your pet dog or cat.
PURCHASE WITH CONFIDENCE: We strive to maintain your satisfaction. Please do not hesitate to contact us with any questions or concerns.
description: Product Description Take a stroll with your pet now with FUNKEEN PET HOUSE Mesh Dog Harness! Instead of attaching the leash directly to the collar, you can give your pet a much safer and more comfortable outdoor experience with our mesh pet harness vest. The soft, breathable mesh material allows your furry friends to feel more comfortable. Your dog will be able to move its body freely with our harness. Choose from your various sizes and colors now! Key Features Breathable & Comfortable Air Mesh Made of high quality air mesh material, very breathable and durable, lightweight, soft and comfortable. This dog harness is ideal for both hot days and year-round, especially perfect in summer. No Pull Design with Sturdy Handle Stainless Steel D-ring leash ring on the back for a leash, quick control with 1 sturdy handle, which can meet your different needs and ensure no stress on dog's neck, pulling pressure is evenly distributed to the body to prevent pulling and choking. Adjustable & Reflective Straps Fully adjustable straps at the chest and neck (with 2 adjustable points) allow a custom perfect fit for your fur friends. Reflective straps for good visibility help you locate your dog easily and ensure its safety at night. Fast & Secure Buckles Quick snap buckle with large loading capacity, is secure and easy to fit and put on/take off. About FUNKEEN PET HOUSE FUNKEEN PET HOUSE, a professional pets supplies manufacturer, strives to help pet owners make their pets feel happy and comfortable with our high quality products. FUNKEEN PET HOUSE is the best choice to help you create a fun, warm, and inviting environment for you and your beloved furry animals. How to Choose the Right Size *Please choose by Chest measurement in priority, Neck secondary. The weight should only be used as a guideline. Size XS: Approx. Chest 41-49cm(16.14-19.29inch) Neck 25-30cm(9.84-11.81inch) Size S: Approx. Chest 53-62cm(20.86-24.41inch) Neck 45-52cm(17.72-20.47inch) Size M: Approx. Chest 57-68cm(22.44-26.77inch) Neck 49-56cm(19.29-22.05inch) Size L: Approx. Chest 70-88cm(27.56-34.65inch) Neck 62-76cm(24.41-29.92inch) Specification: - Material: Air Mesh - Color: Red/ Black Package Includes: - 1 x Dog Harness (***leash not included***) User Instruction: Unbuckle the chest straps and loosen the neck straps. User Instruction: Put the harness on your dog’s back. User Instruction: Clip buckles under dog’s neck and chest. User Instruction: Adjust the straps accordingly to fit your dog's body and secure the fitting. Unbuckle the chest straps and loosen the neck straps. Put the harness on your dog’s back. Clip buckles under dog’s neck and chest. Adjust the straps accordingly to fit your dog's body and secure the fitting.
